overall.description: First-person driving gameplay through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night. The vehicle navigates elevated highways, busy intersections, neon-lit tunnels, and market streets while following traffic and passing pedestrians with umbrellas. Heavy rain and vibrant neon lighting create an atmospheric, cinematic scene characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077.

events.description: approaching first major intersection with yellow crosswalk stripes

agents.ego_description: driving on elevated highway following a dark sedan ahead at moderate speed

notable_agents.action: vehicle ahead driving in same direction on the highway

entered.detail: massive concrete pillars supporting the elevated highway
large red neon sign reading SECTOR on distant building

segments.scene_description: Driving on an elevated highway through heavy rain, following a vehicle ahead. Concrete pillars line both sides while a large red neon SECTOR sign is visible in the distance on the right. The scene is dominated by wet asphalt reflecting neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with commercial buildings

events.description: turning right at the intersection onto commercial street
waiting for pedestrians with umbrellas to cross the street

agents.ego_description: navigating a right turn at the busy intersection while yielding to pedestrians crossing with umbrellas

notable_agents.action: person holding umbrella crossing the street in front of vehicle
oncoming vehicle stopped at the intersection waiting

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crosswalk
tall buildings covered in neon signage and digital billboards
traffic lights suspended over the intersection

segments.scene_description: Turning right at a busy intersection marked by broad yellow crosswalk stripes. Pedestrians with umbrellas cross the street while neon-lit commercial buildings tower on the left. The SECTOR sign moves closer on the right as the vehicle navigates the turn.

events.description: approaching tunnel entrance with Fuyutsuki building visible on left
entering covered tunnel area with artificial neon lighting

agents.ego_description: driving through commercial district approaching the tunnel entrance, following the vehicle ahead

notable_agents.action: vehicle ahead slowing down as it enters the tunnel

entered.detail: distinctive curved teal building with Fuyutsuki signage
dark tunnel entrance framed with green neon trim

segments.scene_description: Driving past the curved Fuyutsuki building on the left while approaching a dark tunnel entrance ahead. The vehicle follows traffic into the tunnel as the lighting shifts from open neon to artificial tunnel illumination.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit underpass with vertical orange light strips

events.description: fully entered tunnel with vertical neon strips lining walls
approaching tunnel exit with natural neon light visible ahead

agents.ego_description: driving through the narrow tunnel following the vehicle ahead, surrounded by glowing vertical neon strips

entered.detail: concrete tunnel walls covered in graffiti and digital posters
vertical orange neon light strips running along tunnel walls
vertical orange neon light strips running along tunnel walls

segments.scene_description: Driving through a narrow underpass tunnel illuminated by vertical orange neon strips on both walls. The concrete walls feature graffiti and digital posters. The vehicle moves toward the tunnel exit where external neon light becomes visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: market street with red white barriers and Kabuki district entrance

events.description: exiting tunnel into open market area with street vendors
approaching large red neon Kabuki district sign overhead

agents.ego_description: navigating through the market street toward the Kabuki district sign, passing pedestrians and vendors

notable_agents.action: person with blue umbrella walking along the sidewalk

entered.detail: street market stalls with red and white striped awnings
large overhead red neon sign reading KABUKI marking the district entrance
red and white striped construction barriers lining the street

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel into a bustling market street lined with red and white striped stalls and barriers. Pedestrians with umbrellas walk along the wet sidewalks as the vehicle approaches the large red neon KABUKI sign marking the district entrance ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city, transitioning from an open elevated highway into a narrow tunnel and finally emerging into a crowded market district. It begins on a wet highway following another vehicle past concrete pillars, with a large red neon SECTOR sign glowing in the distance. As the vehicle turns right at a busy intersection, the camera passes pedestrians with umbrellas and towering commercial buildings before gliding past the curved Fuyutsuki building toward a dark tunnel entrance. The scene then shifts into a narrow underpass illuminated by vertical orange neon strips and graffiti-covered walls, moving steadily toward a glimmer of external light. Finally, the vehicle exits the tunnel into a bustling market street lined with striped stalls and pedestrians, approaching a massive red neon KABUKI sign that marks the entrance to the district.
